overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a hooded medieval character exploring a waterfront settlement. The character walks along a wooden dock overlooking calm waters, then returns to shore and approaches a fortified wooden palisade gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden fishing dock extending over calm water

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock and panning the camera to observe the water and distant scenery

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the pier surface
medieval stone keep visible on the shoreline
tranquil water surface reflecting morning light
rocky landmass visible on the horizon
vertical wooden posts supporting the dock structure

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wooden dock extending over calm morning waters. A stone castle tower stands visible on the distant shore to the right, while rocky islands emerge on the left horizon. The camera pans to capture the expansive waterfront views.

events.description: character turns around on the dock to walk back toward the shore
passes by an NPC fisherman seated on the dock

agents.ego_description: turning around and walking back along the dock toward the shore, passing fishing equipment

notable_agents.action: sitting on the dock near fishing nets and equipment

entered.detail: coiled ropes and netting piled on the dock
villager character sitting on the dock edge

segments.scene_description: The character turns and walks back along the narrow dock, passing a seated NPC fisherman and fishing equipment. The stone castle tower looms larger on the right as the character heads toward the shore, with the open water now visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: pebble beach with fish drying racks

events.description: steps off the wooden dock onto the gravel shore
passes wooden racks with fish hanging to dry

agents.ego_description: walking from the dock onto the gravel shore toward the wooden palisade wall

entered.detail: pebble and stone beach area between dock and palisade
tall defensive wall made of vertical wooden logs with crenellations
wooden structure with hanging fish drying in the open air

segments.scene_description: The character steps off the dock onto a gravel shore, walking past wooden fish drying racks. A tall wooden palisade wall dominates the right side of the view, with the stone castle tower now closer behind it. The environment transitions from waterfront to fortified settlement perimeter.

events.description: approaching the wooden gate entrance in the palisade wall

agents.ego_description: walking toward the wooden gate entrance, preparing to enter the fortification

notable_agents.action: guard standing near the gate entrance

entered.detail: large arched wooden gate entrance with hanging decorations
tall wooden tower with thatched roof overlooking the gate

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the imposing wooden gate of the palisade, with a watchtower looming overhead. The path leads directly to the arched entrance where guard figures stand watch. The stone castle tower is now visible in the distance to the left as the character nears the gate.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an expansive waterfront vista to the enclosed entrance of a fortified settlement. It begins with the character walking along a wooden dock over calm morning waters, panning to reveal rocky islands on the horizon and a distant stone castle tower. As the character turns to head back toward the shore, the camera passes a seated fisherman and fishing gear while the castle tower looms larger on the right. The scene then shifts from the open water to a gravel shore, moving past wooden fish drying racks as a tall wooden palisade wall begins to dominate the view. Finally, the path leads directly toward an imposing wooden gate and overhead watchtower, where guard figures stand watch and the stone tower recedes into the distance to the left.
